mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT u.*, r.role_code, r.role_name FROM user u LEFT JOIN user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.deleted = 0
AND (u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.department LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND r.role_code = #{roleCode}
ORDER BY u.create_time DESC
